Charge & multiplicity: neutral singlet parent (charge 0, multiplicity 1); cation (+1, doublet) and anion (–1, doublet) states generated automatically.
Software/backend: chemkit fukui-reactivity skill (engine subcommand `fukui`) calling PySCF.
